refund_request.stated_reason: My laptop's screen started flickering around day 45 after purchase, and by day 55 it would not boot at all. I followed every troubleshooting step in support's email — safe mode, battery reset, BIOS reset — none worked. I need a full refund.

purchase.item_description: Meridian X14 ultrabook laptop, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, 1-year manufacturer warranty

store_policy.condition_requirements: Unopened, in original packaging. Opened electronics are final sale except where law requires otherwise.
store_policy.notes: Returns outside the 30-day window are not eligible except as required by law.

citations.summary: Implied warranty of merchantability on consumer goods — goods must be fit for the ordinary purpose for which such goods are used, and remain so for at least 60 days and up to one year from sale.

Where a seller is unable to service or repair consumer goods to conform to applicable warranties after a reasonable number of attempts, the buyer may elect replacement or restitution (Song-Beverly Consumer Warranty Act).
Retailer must conspicuously display refund policy; where displayed policy is more restrictive than this Act, the consumer's statutory rights control.
